mapper.select:
{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_SO_PRINT_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soTypeList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mallNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refSoList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srchAddr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{asc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{instCtgrList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
